pi_items.source: setup_task.sh CouchDB injection explicitly defines firstName "Walter" and lastName "Bishop"
task description, export_result.sh, and verifier.py logic explicitly use this file path
setup_task.sh explicitly injects active medications "Digoxin" and "Warfarin", and allergies "Penicillin" and "Strawberries"
setup_task.sh explicitly injects medication "Amoxicillin" with status "Completed", which therefore must be omitted from the active summary

privileged_info_summary: The patient "Walter Bishop" and his records are synthetically generated and dynamically injected via setup scripts. The task strictly requires extracting active medications ("Digoxin", "Warfarin") and known allergies ("Penicillin", "Strawberries") into "/home/ga/transfer_summary.txt", while explicitly omitting inactive medications like "Amoxicillin".
